resolved.descriptionHtml: A comment thread on a pull request was marked as resolved.
resolved.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to a comment thread on a pull request. For more information, see "About pull request reviews." For information about the APIs to manage pull request reviews, see the GraphQL API documentation or "Pull request review comments" in the REST API documentation.

For activity related to pull request review comments, pull request comments, or pull request reviews, use the pull_request_review_comment, issue_comment, or pull_request_review events instead.

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Pull requests" repository permission.

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."

bodyParameters.name: organization
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub organization. Webhook payloads contain the organization property when the webhook is configured for an organization, or when the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

childParamsGroups.name: author_association
childParamsGroups.description: How the author is associated with the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: auto_merge
childParamsGroups.description: The status of auto merging a pull request.

childParamsGroups.name: commit_message
childParamsGroups.description: Commit message for the merge commit.

childParamsGroups.name: commit_title
childParamsGroups.description: Title for the merge commit message.

childParamsGroups.name: merge_method
childParamsGroups.description: The merge method to use.

childParamsGroups.name: repo
childParamsGroups.description: A git repository

childParamsGroups.name: allow_auto_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow auto-merge for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_forking
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow private forks

childParamsGroups.name: allow_merge_commit
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow merge commits for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_rebase_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow rebase merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: allow_squash_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to allow squash merges for pull requests.

childParamsGroups.name: archived
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is archived.

childParamsGroups.name: default_branch
childParamsGroups.description: The default branch of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: delete_branch_on_merge
childParamsGroups.description: Whether to delete head branches when pull requests are merged

childParamsGroups.name: disabled
childParamsGroups.description: Returns whether or not this repository is disabled.

childParamsGroups.description: Whether downloads are enabled.

childParamsGroups.description: The policy controlling who can create pull requests: all or collaborators_only.

childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the repository

childParamsGroups.name: private
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is private or public.

childParamsGroups.description: Whether to require contributors to sign off on web-based commits

bodyParameters.name: repository
bodyParameters.description: The repository on GitHub where the event occurred. Webhook payloads contain the repository property when the event occurs from activity in a repository.

childParamsGroups.name: author_association
childParamsGroups.description: How the author is associated with the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: body
childParamsGroups.description: The text of the comment.

childParamsGroups.name: commit_id
childParamsGroups.description: The SHA of the commit to which the comment applies.

childParamsGroups.name: diff_hunk
childParamsGroups.description: The diff of the line that the comment refers to.

childParamsGroups.name: html_url
childParamsGroups.description: HTML URL for the pull request review comment.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the pull request review comment.

childParamsGroups.name: in_reply_to_id
childParamsGroups.description: The comment ID to reply to.

childParamsGroups.name: line
childParamsGroups.description: The line of the blob to which the comment applies. The last line of the range for a multi-line comment

childParamsGroups.name: node_id
childParamsGroups.description: The node ID of the pull request review comment.

childParamsGroups.name: original_commit_id
childParamsGroups.description: The SHA of the original commit to which the comment applies.

childParamsGroups.name: original_line
childParamsGroups.description: The line of the blob to which the comment applies. The last line of the range for a multi-line comment

childParamsGroups.name: original_position
childParamsGroups.description: The index of the original line in the diff to which the comment applies.

childParamsGroups.name: original_start_line
childParamsGroups.description: The first line of the range for a multi-line comment.

childParamsGroups.name: path
childParamsGroups.description: The relative path of the file to which the comment applies.

childParamsGroups.name: position
childParamsGroups.description: The line index in the diff to which the comment applies.

childParamsGroups.name: pull_request_review_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the pull request review to which the comment belongs.

childParamsGroups.name: pull_request_url
childParamsGroups.description: URL for the pull request that the review comment belongs to.

childParamsGroups.name: side
childParamsGroups.description: The side of the first line of the range for a multi-line comment.

childParamsGroups.name: start_line
childParamsGroups.description: The first line of the range for a multi-line comment.

childParamsGroups.name: start_side
childParamsGroups.description: The side of the first line of the range for a multi-line comment.

childParamsGroups.name: subject_type
childParamsGroups.description: The level at which the comment is targeted, can be a diff line or a file.

childParamsGroups.name: url
childParamsGroups.description: URL for the pull request review comment

unresolved.descriptionHtml: A previously resolved comment thread on a pull request was marked as unresolved.
unresolved.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to a comment thread on a pull request. For more information, see "About pull request reviews." For information about the APIs to manage pull request reviews, see the GraphQL API documentation or "Pull request review comments" in the REST API documentation.

For activity related to pull request review comments, pull request comments, or pull request reviews, use the pull_request_review_comment, issue_comment, or pull_request_review events instead.

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Pull requests" repository permission.
